metadata.description: Finam Trade API plugin collection for algorithmic trading and market data workflows.

plugins.name: finam
plugins.description: Finam Trade API plugin for Cursor. Skills: finam:trade-api for real-time quotes, order book, OHLCV candles, portfolio and orders via REST, gRPC, and WebSocket; instrument search and volatility scanning; placing and cancelling orders through Finam broker; developing algorithmic trading scripts.
